card_name: Son Goku // Stopping Power Son Goku
ip_outcome_note: Card name on frame is 'Son Goku // Stopping Power Son Goku' — the card itself names the character. Son Goku is a Wizards/Bandai-internal IP (Toei Animation / Shueisha property), not an external crossover risk. Verified. No ## IP callout block required.

trivia_bullets.text: This is a double-sided / two-name Uncommon card from the World Martial Arts Tournament Themed Booster (DBS-TB02, 2018), representing Goku during the 28th World Martial Arts Tournament arc — the final arc of Dragon Ball Z. The 'Stopping Power' title references Goku's role blocking or controlling the pace of his match against Uub. [WebSearch: dbs-cardgame.com TB02 product / DBZ Exchange TB02]

The orange gi and dark-blue undershirt visible in the card art are Goku's signature outfit worn consistently across Dragon Ball Z and early Dragon Ball Super. Goku's gi color and spiky black hair are among the most immediately recognizable character design signatures in anime history. [WebSearch: Wikipedia Trunks (Dragon Ball) for character design context / CBR Future Trunks differences]
sources: WebSearch: Wikipedia Trunks Dragon Ball character design
WebSearch: CBR Dragon Ball Super Goku design

trivia_bullets.text: TB02 introduced 'Link Cards' — two-card pairs that unlock additional effects when fielded together. The double-slash naming convention ('Son Goku // Stopping Power Son Goku') indicates this card participates in that mechanic, pairing with a counterpart card to unleash full potential. The set contains 125 unique cards distributed across 24 packs per box. [WebSearch: Bleeding Cool TB02 checklist / DBZ Exchange TB02]
sources: WebSearch: DBZ Exchange TB02 booster box

related_cards.name: Trading Blows Son Goku (TB2-036)
related_cards.note: Second Goku card in same set — both represent the 28th Tournament arc

related_cards.name: Shocking Latent Ability (TB2-033)
